_comment: Copy this file to 'config.json' and fill in your real values. config.json is git-ignored so your password stays private.
_supabase_comment: Optional. If you fill these in, synced accounts are pushed to your Supabase database so the app remembers them forever. Leave blank to just write a local accounts.json file instead.
_options_comment: headless:false shows the browser window (helpful the first few times). Set to true once it works to run silently.
